summary: Comprehensive testing of Locofast v2.7 incremental features: Collections removed from navbar, Composition filter added, Denim oz filter logic, Agent payment proof upload. All 12 backend tests passed. All frontend flows verified via Playwright.
passed_tests: Navbar does NOT show 'Collections' link in header (verified - only Home, About, Sellers sign up, Apply for Credit, Request Quote)
Fabrics page shows Composition filter dropdown with data-testid='filter-composition'
Backend /api/fabrics/filter-options returns compositions array with materials like Cotton, Polyester, etc.
Composition filter actually filters fabrics when selected
When Denim category selected, Weight filter shows 'WEIGHT (OZ)' instead of 'GSM RANGE'
When non-Denim category selected, both 'GSM RANGE' and 'WEIGHT (OZ)' filters shown
Agent payment proof upload endpoint POST /api/agent/upload-payment-proof requires authentication (401)
Agent shared cart model accepts payment_proof_url field
Agent dashboard page loads with Cart tab showing payment proof upload UI
Checkout page shows split Packaging (₹1/m) and Logistics for bulk orders
Admin agents page works with Create Agent button
Admin orders page shows booking type labels (SAMPLE/BULK + Online)
critical_code_review_comments: Navbar.js navLinks array correctly excludes Collections - only has Home, About, Sellers sign up
FabricsPage.js correctly implements isDenimCategory logic using useMemo to detect denim category
FabricsPage.js shows 'Weight (oz)' label when isDenimCategory is true, hides GSM Range
Backend filter-options endpoint correctly extracts compositions from fabric composition arrays
Agent router correctly includes payment_proof_url in CreateSharedCartRequest model
Agent upload-payment-proof endpoint saves files to /uploads/payment_proofs/ directory
context_for_next_testing_agent: All v2.7 features tested and working. Key changes: 1) Collections removed from navbar header (still exists in admin sidebar for management), 2) Composition filter added to FabricsPage with data-testid='filter-composition', 3) Denim category (cat-denim) triggers isDenimCategory which shows Weight (oz) instead of GSM Range, 4) Agent payment proof upload at POST /api/agent/upload-payment-proof saves to /uploads/payment_proofs/, 5) CreateSharedCartRequest includes payment_proof_url field. Checkout split logistics still working (Packaging ₹1/m + Logistics).

navbar_no_collections.details: Navbar header shows: Home, About, Sellers sign up, Apply for Credit, Request Quote, Login, Instant Booking. No Collections link.

composition_filter.details: Fabrics page expanded filters show Composition dropdown. Backend returns compositions array from /api/fabrics/filter-options.

denim_oz_filter.details: When Denim category selected, filter label changes from 'GSM RANGE' to 'WEIGHT (OZ)'. Non-denim shows both.

agent_payment_proof.details: POST /api/agent/upload-payment-proof endpoint exists and requires auth. CreateSharedCartRequest model includes payment_proof_url field.

split_logistics.details: Checkout shows Packaging (₹1/m) = ₹500 and Logistics = ₹2,500 for 500m bulk order.

admin_orders_booking_type.details: Orders page shows TYPE column with 'SAMPLE Online' and 'BULK Online' labels.

admin_agents_page.details: Agents page shows list with Create Agent button, agent status, and stats icons.
